# agentops_credential (Resource)

A stored credential whose secret value is managed out-of-band. The value is write-only and never returned by the API; changing it replaces the credential's secret in place.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "agentops_credential" "openai" {
  name        = "openai-api-key"
  value       = var.openai_api_key # write-only; never read back
  description = "OpenAI API key for agents"
  labels = {
    team = "platform"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Human-readable credential name. Changing this forces a new credential.
- `value` (String, Sensitive) The secret value. Write-only; never returned by the API. Changing it replaces the stored secret.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Free-form description.
- `labels` (Map of String) Arbitrary key/value labels.
- `owner` (String) Owner of the credential.
- `status` (String) Credential status. Server-assigned when omitted.

### Read-Only

- `active_version` (Number) Currently active secret version.
- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `id` (String) Credential identifier.
- `last_replaced_at` (String) Timestamp of the last value replacement.
- `last_used_at` (String) Timestamp the credential was last used.
- `updated_at` (String) Last-update timestamp.
